title: MoreGraves
description: this plugin adds graves to Minecraft
body:
Keep death fair, readable, and easy to recover.

`MoreGraves` creates a grave when a player dies and safely stores their items, armor, offhand, and part of their XP. The grave can show a hologram, spawn particles, give the player a compass to the grave, and restore everything back to the exact inventory slots with `Shift + Right Click`.

![MoreGraves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8a492c43c8989a0d6d72ba19adfba98866d57e.png)# MoreGraves

## Features

- Works on Minecraft `1.21.x`
- Built for `Paper` and suitable for `Spigot` and `Bukkit` style servers
- Creates a grave on death and stores the full inventory
- Restores items to the original inventory slots
- Gives a grave compass after respawn
- Optional grave preview with normal right click
- `Shift + Right Click` to claim everything
- Grave expires after a configurable time
- Hologram with player, death cause, and remaining time
- Particles around active graves
- Multiple grave-head styles
- Extra language support with `/lang`
- Safe placement for lava and void deaths
- Prevents graves from spawning above the Nether roof

## How It Works

1. A player dies.
2. MoreGraves creates a grave at a safe nearby location.
3. The grave stores the player's items, armor, offhand, and saved XP.
4. After respawn, the player receives a compass pointing to the grave.
5. Right click the grave to preview the contents.
6. Sneak and right click to restore everything to the original slots.
7. If the grave expires, it breaks and drops the items on the ground.

## Commands

- `/moregraves reload`
- `/moregraves lifetime`
- `/moregraves lifetime show`
- `/moregraves lifetime set 3h`
- `/moregraves lifetime add 30m`
- `/moregraves lifetime remove 10m`
- `/moregraves lifetime reset`
- `/lang en`
- `/lang nl`
- `/lang de`
- `/lang fr`
- `/lang es`

## Lifetime Examples

- `5s`
- `30s`
- `2m`
- `15m`
- `1h30m`
- `1d`
- `1w`
- `1mo`
- `1y`

## Good For Servers That Want

- Fair death recovery
- A cleaner alternative to instant item drops
- Better PvE and survival death handling
- A simple grave system without massive structures
- Clear visuals for players through holograms and particles

## Default Gameplay Flow

When someone dies, the grave appears in a safe spot near the death location. The player respawns, gets a grave compass, and can travel back to the grave. A normal right click lets them inspect the contents first, and `Shift + Right Click` restores the stored gear exactly where it used to be.

## Notes

- The default language is English
- Grave lifetime is configurable
- The plugin supports multiple visual grave-head styles
- Active graves can use particles for better visibility
